title: Fix fees customization tab visibility (owner-only access enforcement)

requirements.text: Ensure the 'Customize Site' button in the Navbar is only rendered for the authenticated owner. The current logic that conditionally shows the button must be audited and corrected so that no non-owner user ever sees it, regardless of authentication state. Do not change any other UI or logic.

quotes: solve the fees customization failure and change nothing else, the customization tab still visible to me

acceptanceCriteria: A user who is NOT the registered owner does not see the 'Customize Site' button in the Navbar after login.
The registered owner still sees and can access the 'Customize Site' button.
No other UI, routes, or backend logic is changed.

requirements.text: Ensure the Admin Panel page enforces owner-only access at the route/component level. If a non-owner navigates directly to the admin route, they must see the AccessDeniedScreen and must not be shown the Customize/Fee Category/Payment tabs. Do not change any other functionality.

quotes: solve the fees customization failure and change nothing else, the customization tab still visible to me

acceptanceCriteria: Non-owner authenticated users who navigate directly to /admin are shown AccessDeniedScreen.
The 'Fees' customization tab inside the Admin Panel is not accessible to non-owners.
Owner retains full access to all admin tabs.
No other pages, components, or backend logic are affected.

constraints: Do not change any backend logic, data models, or Motoko code.
Do not change any other frontend pages, components, or styling outside of the owner-access guard logic.
Preserve all existing functionality for the owner role.
nonGoals: Changing the fees payment flow for regular users.
Modifying homepage content or other pages.
